title: Genesis: Ad Astra
body:
![View from Venus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u1utgom7/images/641980f7d8f8ff08e9340da2e1e7f7377284100e.png)

### Use Ad Astra with Genesis!

Features:
- Fly to Ad Astra planets in Genesis space on a VS2 ship!
- Replaces Ad Astra skyboxes with Genesis skyboxes, allowing you to see all nearby planets (if the atmosphere is thin enough)
- Integrates Ad Astra's oxygen system
  - Need oxygen to breathe in space
  - Oxygen Distributor works on ships
- Integrates Ad Astra's gravity system
  - Gravity Normalizer works on ships
